meta.title: 我有两个孩子
meta.sourceTextPolicy: 保留教材原句；新增内容标记为教学扩展

有.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sì kǒu rén.
有.english: There are four people in my family.

多少.english: How many students do you have?
How many children do you have?

哥哥.english: My elder brother is twelve years old this year.

没有.english: I don't have a younger sister.

家.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sì kǒu rén.
家.english: There are four people in my family.

家.pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
家.english: How many people are in your family?

几.pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
几.english: How many people are in your family?
How many children do you have?

口.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sì kǒu rén.
口.english: There are four people in my family.

口.pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
口.english: How many people are in your family?

爸爸.english: My dad is forty years old this year.

妈妈.pinyin: Wǒ māma yǒu liǎng gè háizi.

妈妈.english: Mom is thirty-eight years old this year.

妹妹.english: My younger sister is five years old this year.

儿子.english: My son is five years old this year.

孩子.english: The child is five years old this year.

女儿.english: My daughter is twelve years old this year.

他.english: He is five years old this year.

今年.english: How old are you this year?
He is five years old this year.

多大.english: How old are you this year?

g_l04_01.structure: 主语 + 有 + 数量 + 量词 + 名词
g_l04_01.structureEn: Subject + 有 + number + measure word + noun.
g_l04_01.structureRu: Подлежащее + 有 + число + счётное слово + существительное.
g_l04_01.english: 有 expresses possession or existence. The negative form is 没有.
g_l04_01.russian: 有 выражает наличие или обладание; отрицательная форма — 没有.

g_l04_02.english: 呢 asks about the situation of the person or thing just mentioned.
g_l04_02.russian: 呢 в конце вопроса спрашивает о ситуации у ранее упомянутого человека или предмета.

g_l04_03.structure: 数词 + 量词 + 名词；几/多少 + 量词 + 名词
g_l04_03.structureEn: number + measure word + noun; 几/多少 + measure word + noun.
g_l04_03.structureRu: число + счётное слово + существительное; 几/多少 + счётное слово + существительное.
g_l04_03.english: Use a measure word after a number when counting people or things.
g_l04_03.russian: После числа при подсчёте людей и предметов обычно употребляется счётное слово.

g_l04_04.structure: 十岁以下：几岁？；十岁以上：多大？
g_l04_04.structureEn: Under ten: 几岁？; generally over ten: 多大？
g_l04_04.structureRu: До десяти лет: 几岁？; обычно старше десяти: 多大？
g_l04_04.english: Use 几岁 for young children and 多大 for an older child or adult.
g_l04_04.russian: Для маленьких детей используется 几岁, для более старших — 多大.

grammar.title: “有”字句
grammar.explanation: 表示领有，否定形式为“没/没有”。

examples.english: I don't have an elder brother.

grammar.title: 语气助词“呢”
grammar.explanation: 呢在句末，表示疑问，询问上文提到的情况。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu liǎng gè gēge, nǐ ne?
examples.english: I have two elder brothers. How about you?

examples.pinyin: Wǒ jiào Bái Jiāyuè, nǐ ne?
examples.english: My name is Bai Jiayue. How about you?

grammar.title: 名量词和名量结构
grammar.explanation: 表达数量时，数词后一般要带量词，如“四口人、两个哥哥”。

grammar.title: 年龄的表达
grammar.explanation: 十岁以下时询问“几岁”，十岁以上一般询问“多大”。

texts.title: 对话一
texts.scene: 在家里，刘明和王一雪在聊天儿。

lines.speaker: 刘明
lines.english: How many students does she have?

texts.title: 对话二
texts.scene: 在公司里，王一雪和杨同乐休息时聊天儿。

lines.speaker: 王一雪
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu liǎng gè gēge, nǐ ne?
lines.english: I have two elder brothers. How about you?

lines.speaker: 杨同乐
lines.english: I don't have any elder brothers.

lines.speaker: 王一雪
lines.pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
lines.english: How many people are there in your family?

lines.speaker: 杨同乐
lines.hanzi: 我家有四口人，爸爸、妈妈、妹妹和我。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sì kǒu rén, bàba, māma, mèimei hé wǒ.
lines.english: There are four people in my family: my dad, mom, younger sister, and me.

texts.title: 对话三
texts.scene: 在街上，王一雪带着儿子偶遇杨同乐。

lines.speaker: 王一雪
lines.hanzi: 是的。我有两个孩子，一个儿子，一个女儿。
lines.pinyin: Shì de. Wǒ yǒu liǎng gè háizi, yí gè érzi, yí gè nǚ'ér.
lines.english: Yes. I have two children, a son and a daughter.

warmup.title: 家庭与年龄
warmup.prompt: Think about your family and age.
warmup.intro: 这一课学完，你可以介绍家里有几口人，询问家人的年龄。
warmup.question: 如果你想介绍自己的家庭，下面哪句话最合适？
warmup.questionEn: Which sentence is most useful for introducing your family?

options.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sì kǒu rén.

questions.question: Which group names family members? 下面哪一组是家里的成员？
How do you ask a young child's age? 小孩的年龄一般怎么问？
What does “我没有哥哥” mean? “我没有哥哥”的意思是：

options.text: I don't have an elder brother.

questions.answer: I don't have an elder brother.

questions.question: What does 哥哥 mean? “哥哥”的意思是：
教学扩展：Translate into Chinese: I have two children.
questions.prompt: English hint: Use 我、有、两个、孩子。

questions.question: 教学扩展：Translate into Chinese: How old is your son?
questions.prompt: English hint: Use 您、儿子、几岁。

data.passage: 我家有四口人，爸爸、妈妈、妹妹和我。
data.passage_pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sì kǒu rén, bàba, māma, mèimei hé wǒ.
data.question_en: Who is in Yang Tongle's family?

data.statement_pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
data.statement_en: There are five people in my family.
My elder brother is five years old.

data.statement: 爸爸、妈妈和我是四口人。
data.statement_pinyin: Bàba, māma hé wǒ shì sì kǒu rén.
data.statement_en: Dad, mom, and I are four people.

data.statement_pinyin: Wáng Yīxuě yǒu liǎng gè háizi.
Yáng Tónglè jiā yǒu sān kǒu rén.
data.statement_en: Yang Tongle's family has three people.

data.statement: 王一雪的儿子今年五岁。
data.statement_pinyin: Wáng Yīxuě de érzi jīnnián wǔ suì.
data.statement_en: Wang Yixue's son is five years old this year.

data.statement: 王一雪有一个儿子和一个女儿。
data.statement_pinyin: Wáng Yīxuě yǒu yí gè érzi hé yí gè nǚ'ér.
data.statement_en: Wang Yixue has one son and one daughter.
Yang Tongle does not have an elder brother.

data.statement_pinyin: Yáng Tónglè jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
data.statement_en: Yang Tongle's family has five people.

readingExamples.多少: How many children do you have?
readingExamples.没有: I do not have an elder brother.
readingExamples.家: There are four people in my family.
readingExamples.几: How many people are in your family?
readingExamples.口: There are four people in my family.
readingExamples.爸爸: My dad is forty years old.
readingExamples.妹妹: My younger sister is five years old.
readingExamples.今年: He is five years old this year.

A.label: A档：基础巩固
A.goal: 掌握有、没有、数量和年龄表达
A.suggestedMix: 10道客观题 + 1道翻译 + 1道汉字书写

B.label: B档：综合运用
B.goal: 在家庭与年龄情境中使用本课句型
B.suggestedMix: 10道客观题 + 1道句子输出 + 1道汉字书写

C.label: C档：挑战拓展
C.goal: 综合表达家庭成员和年龄
C.suggestedMix: 10道客观题 + 1道自我介绍 + 1道汉字书写

sharedPool.prompt_en: What does 我家有四口人 mean?
options: There are four people in my family.
My family is four years old.
sharedPool.correct_answer: There are four people in my family.
acceptable_answers: There are four people in my family.

sharedPool.prompt_cn: 连词成句：我 / 有 / 两个 / 孩子
教学扩展：把英文翻译成中文：How many people are in your family?
sharedPool.prompt_en: Translate into Chinese. Use: 你家、几口人。

sharedPool.prompt_cn: 书写本课汉字：有、家、孩、岁
sharedPool.prompt_en: Write the characters 有、家、孩、岁.
What does 你家有几口人？ ask about?

sharedPool.prompt_cn: 连词成句：他 / 是 / 我的 / 儿子
教学扩展：请用中文写一句话介绍你的家庭。
sharedPool.prompt_en: Write one Chinese sentence about your family. Use: 我家、有、口、人。

assignmentSelection.attemptPolicy: 每个学生最多提交2次，教师端保留最后一次提交
